programme.desc: The story of MoviePass, the company that offered cinema tickets at a discounted rate. It was a movie lover's dreaam, but in just eight years it went from being the fastest-growing subscription service since Spotify to total bankruptcy. This documentary chronicles the visionary mission of its co-founders, its early success and how it finally failed due to mismanagement and corporate greed.

programme.title: My Icon: Natasha Jonas
programme.desc: The boxer speaks about the people who have inspired her career.

programme.title: Benetton Formula
programme.desc: The history of the Formula 1 team led by Alessandro Benetton, told through the memories of its key members and archive footage.

programme.title: Discovering: Sigourney Weaver
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actress, who rose to fame in Ridley Scott's Alien and was nominated for an Acacdemy Award when she reprised her role in Aliens in 1986.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of American film-maker Richard Linklater, whose films include the Before trilogy, School of Rock, Me and Orson Welles, A Scanner Darkly and Boyhood.

programme.title: The Movies
programme.desc: The journey through American cinema continues with a look at the 1990s, including GoodFellas, Basic Instinct, The Silence of the Lambs and Thelma and Louise.

programme.title: UFO
programme.desc: A look at how acclaimed psychiatrist John Mack began an investigation into claims of alien abduction and the shocking discoveries he made.

programme.title: Tell Them You Love Me
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the story of esteemed university professor Anna Stubblefield's controversial affair with Derrick Johnson, a non-verbal man with cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Barbie Uncovered: A Dreamhouse Divided
programme.desc: The story of the two people responsible for creating the Barbie doll - Ruth Handler, the Jewish immigrant who built the largest toy company in the world from nothing and designer Jack Ryan, the man said to have actually created the doll.

programme.title: Villeneuve Pironi: Racing's Untold Tragedy
programme.desc: The relationship between F1 drivers Gilles Villeneuve and Didier Pironi, team-mates whose friendship was torn apart after a controversial ending to the 1982 San Marino Grand Prix.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: A pride of lions faces a struggle to survive when cubs are born during Zambia's rainy season. The lions must fight off hyenas and avoid being trampled by elephants.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Year
programme.desc: A four-part journey through Africa to experience the seasons that shape the continent. Spring in southern Africa brings long days and high temperatures, as the natural world flurries into life, transforming the continent on land and in the cold waters of the rugged coastlines. programme.title: Coral City

programme.title: Into the Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: Following the journey of a young cotton-top tamarin as she leaves her birth family in search of a mate in another troop.

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: A profile of Madonna, the first kinda baboon to be studied from birth to adulthood, a research project that is helping experts understand the secrets of her species.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Food-obsessed Beni gets a dramatic smackdown from the local dominant male, Petruk, while Bumi goes on a wild joyride with Greta.
